frequentlyTestedConcepts: Swaran Singh Committee vs 42nd Amendment vs 86th Amendment details.
Categorization of DPSPs: Socialistic, Gandhian, and Liberal-Intellectual.
Non-justiciable nature of Part IV and Part IVA.
Borrowed features: Ireland for DPSPs, USSR for Fundamental Duties.
repeatedThemes: Match the Following questions on Article numbers and provisions.
Identifying which options are NOT Fundamental Duties (e.g. duty to vote, duty to pay tax).
Age criteria distinctions across Article 21A, Article 45, and Article 51A(k).
difficultyTrend: Moderate in Tier-1 (Direct article identification); Moderate-to-High in Tier-2 (Statement assertions on amendments and judicial rulings like Minerva Mills).
